author.bio: 🇪🇺 Dad-of-3. Developer Advocate at @Google (🇩🇪), PhD from @la_UPC (🇪🇸), Postdoc at @UniversiteLyon (🇫🇷). #PWA #JavaScript #NodeJS #Fugu 🐡 #SemanticWeb
author.name: Thomas Steiner

content.text:
Wow, that’s an amazingly fast turn-around time :-) One more thing to try could be 
https://github.com/googlechromelabs/dark-mode-toggle#readme, which allows people to override their system setting, maybe because they like their OS dark, but their websites light. Play with the demo to see what it does.
content.html:
Wow, that’s an amazingly fast turn-around time :-) One more thing to try could be
https://github.com/googlechromelabs/dark-mode-toggle#readme, which allows people to override their system setting, maybe because they like their OS dark, but their websites light. Play with the demo to see what it does.
